summary: Wire pagination.nextCursor and pagination.hasMore paths into list commands.
reason: The OpenAPI parser (parser.go:4295) only walks top-level response properties when scanning for next_cursor / has_more. Tella's REST envelope nests them under {pagination:{...}}, so Pagination.NextCursorPath and HasMoreField were emitted as empty strings and the --all loop exited after page 1.
validated_outcome: videos list --all returns all 232 videos across 16 cursor-followed pages (was 15).
